title: Ornithogalum uitenhagense
taxonomy: Ornithogalum uitenhagense is classified as a species within the genus Ornithogalum, which is part of the family Asparagaceae. This classification is based on botanical studies and the analysis of its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The Asparagaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many species of lilies, hyacinths, and asparagus. Ornithogalum uitenhagense is native to South Africa, where it grows in a variety of habitats, including grasslands and rocky outcrops. The classification of Ornithogalum uitenhagense is subject to ongoing research and revision as new information becomes available.
